MANAGER: true

WAVE B: Integrate 9 new perception matchers + bounded-queue listener dispatch + listener-stats endpoint. Manager fork decomposing into 3 worker sub-forks. Sibling Wave A fork (fork_mosmg27e_4333fb) is currently running fixes including the manager-fork stay-alive fix; if that fix has loaded by your consolidation time, your sub-forks will report cleanly to YOU. If not, your sub-forks still ship to disk and the conductor can synthesise from artefacts.
